title: Fish
body:
Have you ever felt that Minecraft neglects fishes alot? If yes this mod is for you!
This mod adds tons of fishes, which you'll find randomly on the world! For example you can get sulphur from a sulphur skitter that you find/fish in Warm Biomes.

This mod is in my opinion pretty fun to explore and get all new fishes and the new fishing mechanic.

The item fish textures are from [Furfsky](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn), but the fish entities, blocks and buckets are made by me.

To disable the custom fishing mechanics you just have to disable the gamerule customFishing
